name: Meike 85mm f/1.4 AF Lens
description: An impressive short telephoto lens ideal for portraits and detail shots, the 85mm f/1.4 AF Lens from Meike provides users with a capable optic that is designed for Sony E-mount, full-frame mirrorless cameras.

features.Key Features :: Full-Frame | f/1.4 to f/16 | Fast Aperture Portrait-Length Prime | Autofocus Design | STM Stepping Motor | Multilayer Coating | Electronic Contacts Maintain Exif Data | Minimum Focusing Distance: 3.2' | USB Port for Firmware Upgrades
features.What's in The Box :: Meike 85mm f/1.4 AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | Lens Hood
